_comment: PostToolUse hook: auto-regenerate quirks when a lesson file is written or edited
_usage: Copy the PostToolUse entry into your ~/.claude/settings.json hooks section

hooks.command: python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load(sys.stdin); p=d.get('tool_input',{}).get('file_path','') or d.get('tool_response',{}).get('filePath',''); exit(0 if '/lessons/' in p and p.endswith('.md') else 1)" && python3 /path/to/your/training-repo/generate-quirks.py 2>/dev/null || true
